title: cyclosorus nemoralis
intro: Cyclosorus nemoralis, also known as the Wood fern or the Lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a perennial plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cyclosorus nemoralis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and protect against cancer. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or a tea, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
